PreToolUse.command: docker exec -i ecommerceapp-context-mode node /app/cli.bundle.mjs hook vscode-copilot pretooluse

UserPromptSubmit.command: docker exec -i ecommerceapp-context-mode node /app/cli.bundle.mjs hook vscode-copilot userpromptsubmit

PreCompact.command: docker exec -i ecommerceapp-context-mode node /app/cli.bundle.mjs hook vscode-copilot precompact

SessionStart.command: docker exec -i ecommerceapp-context-mode node /app/cli.bundle.mjs hook vscode-copilot sessionstart
